title: Cheap Enough
description: Remove the annoying 'Too Expensive!' mechanic by capping repair costs at 19 levels.
body:
# Cheap Enough!
This datapack removes the annoying 'Too Expensive!' mechanic on anvils by capping upgrade costs at 19 levels

### Requirements
Should be compatible with most datapacks, only tested on 1.21.x versions

### Limitations
Due to the way detecting players in an anvil works, you must close and re-open the anvil after making an item too expensive to reset it's repair cost
